scripts.web:test: pnpm --filter @project-ai/operator-console test && pnpm --filter @project-ai/docs-portal test && pnpm --filter @project-ai/proof-portal test && pnpm --filter @project-ai/triumvirate-portal test
scripts.web:build: pnpm --filter @project-ai/operator-console build && pnpm --filter @project-ai/docs-portal build && pnpm --filter @project-ai/proof-portal build && pnpm --filter @project-ai/triumvirate-portal build
